_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: pre-commit-ci[bot]
data.message:
[pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate (#4)

updates:
- [github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks: v4.4.0 → v5.0.0](https://github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks/compare/v4.4.0...v5.0.0)
- [github.com/codespell-project/codespell: v2.2.5 → v2.3.0](https://github.com/codespell-project/codespell/compare/v2.2.5...v2.3.0)
- [github.com/pre-commit/mirrors-clang-format: v16.0.6 → v19.1.6](https://github.com/pre-commit/mirrors-clang-format/compare/v16.0.6...v19.1.6)
- [github.com/adrienverge/yamllint: v1.32.0 → v1.35.1](https://github.com/adrienverge/yamllint/compare/v1.32.0...v1.35.1)
- [github.com/hhatto/autopep8: v2.0.4 → v2.3.1](https://github.com/hhatto/autopep8/compare/v2.0.4...v2.3.1)
- [github.com/PyCQA/flake8: 6.1.0 → 7.1.1](https://github.com/PyCQA/flake8/compare/6.1.0...7.1.1)

Co-authored-by: pre-commit-ci[bot] <66853113+pre-commit-ci[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,25 +16,25 @@ repos:
   - id: check-ast
   - id: double-quote-string-fixer
   - id: requirements-txt-fixer
-  rev: v4.4.0
+  rev: v5.0.0
 - repo: https://github.com/codespell-project/codespell
   hooks:
   - id: codespell
     args:
     - --write-changes
-  rev: v2.2.5
+  rev: v2.3.0
 - repo: https://github.com/pre-commit/mirrors-clang-format
   hooks:
   - id: clang-format
-  rev: v16.0.6
+  rev: v19.1.6
 - repo: https://github.com/adrienverge/yamllint
   hooks:
   - id: yamllint
     args:
     - --format
     - parsable
     - --strict
-  rev: v1.32.0
+  rev: v1.35.1
 - repo: https://github.com/jumanjihouse/pre-commit-hook-yamlfmt
   hooks:
   - id: yamlfmt
@@ -53,10 +53,10 @@ repos:
 - repo: https://github.com/hhatto/autopep8
   hooks:
   - id: autopep8
-  rev: v2.0.4
+  rev: v2.3.1
 - repo: https://github.com/PyCQA/flake8
   hooks:
   - id: flake8
-  rev: 6.1.0
+  rev: 7.1.1
 ci:
   autoupdate_schedule: quarterly

@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@

@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@

+Awesome ROS packages to complement Navigation2
